subtitle.zh: 用数据理解你的身体，而不是猜
subtitle.en: Understand your body through data, not guesswork

description.zh: AI 自动分析你的健康数据，发现潜在风险，并生成可执行的健康建议
description.en: AI analyzes your health signals, detects risks, and generates actionable insights for everyday wellbeing

description.zh: 实时生成你的健康状态评分
description.en: Generate a real-time snapshot of your current health state

description.zh: 追踪睡眠、心率、活动变化
description.en: Track changes across sleep, heart rate, and activity

description.zh: 发现风险并给出行动建议
description.en: Detect risks and recommend what to do next

description.zh: 睡眠差但不知道原因，交给 AI 做连续分析
description.en: Understand why sleep quality is slipping before it affects daily energy

description.zh: 父母健康变化出现异常时自动提醒
description.en: Receive early reminders when family health patterns begin to change

description.zh: 用数据优化训练强度和恢复节奏
description.en: Use recovery and activity signals to train more effectively

headline.zh: 把零散健康数据变成清晰判断
headline.en: Turn fragmented health data into clear decisions

description.zh: 从每日记录到 AI 解释，AIHeal 帮你持续理解身体状态，而不是盯着原始数值猜。
description.en: From daily signals to AI explanation, AIHeal helps you understand your health over time instead of guessing from raw numbers.

description.zh: 把 Apple Health、穿戴设备和手动记录汇总成一个可读视图。
description.en: Bring Apple Health, wearables, and manual logs into one readable view.

description.zh: 比单次读数更重要的是变化方向，AIHeal 会持续观察异常偏移。
description.en: Direction matters more than one-off readings, so AIHeal watches for meaningful shifts over time.

description.zh: 不仅发现问题，还会告诉你为什么发生、要先做什么。
description.en: It does not just flag problems. It explains why they may be happening and what to do first.

description.zh: 每天先给用户结果，再展开解释。
description.en: Give users a result first, then explain what it means.

description.zh: 系统会关注睡眠、心率、活动与恢复之间的联动变化，而不是只看单一指标。
description.en: The system looks at how sleep, heart rate, activity, and recovery move together instead of isolating one metric.

bullets.zh: 识别短期波动和长期下滑
bullets.en: Spot short-term swings and long-term decline

bullets.zh: 突出与你个人基线不一致的信号
bullets.en: Highlight signals that are off your personal baseline

bullets.zh: 把变化趋势翻译成通俗结论
bullets.en: Translate changing patterns into plain-language takeaways

description.zh: 每次分析都围绕一个简单问题：现在最值得注意的是什么，以及接下来该做什么。
description.en: Every report centers on a simple question: what matters most right now, and what should happen next.

bullets.zh: 关键发现：突出变化最大的健康信号
bullets.en: Key findings: surface the health signals that changed most

bullets.zh: 风险提示：说明近期可能出现的问题
bullets.en: Risk alerts: explain what may happen in the near term

bullets.zh: 行动建议：按优先级给出下一步
bullets.en: Action plan: suggest what to do next in priority order

title.zh: 为什么 AIHeal 更适合日常健康管理
title.en: Why AIHeal works better for everyday health management

aiheal.zh: 自动汇聚多源健康信号

legacy.zh: 用户自己翻看分散数据
legacy.en: Users read disconnected data on their own

aiheal.en: Starts with a score, then explains why

legacy.zh: 原始数值很多，结论很少
legacy.en: Many raw numbers, few clear conclusions

aiheal.zh: 关注异常偏移与趋势组合
aiheal.en: Detects unusual drift and signal combinations

legacy.zh: 依赖用户自己意识到变化
legacy.en: Relies on users noticing changes themselves

aiheal.zh: 输出可执行的日常行动
aiheal.en: Provides concrete next steps for daily action

legacy.zh: 通常只给图表，不给优先级

headline.zh: 一份让用户立刻相信的示例报告
headline.en: A sample report that builds trust instantly

description.zh: 不登录、不填资料，也能先看懂 AIHeal 会输出什么结果。
description.en: No login and no form required. Users can see exactly what AIHeal produces before they commit.

body.zh: 整合睡眠、心率、活动、手动输入和历史报告。
body.en: Combine sleep, heart rate, activity, manual input, and historical reports.

body.zh: 判断当前变化是否偏离了你的个人正常区间。
body.en: Check whether current changes are drifting away from your personal baseline.

body.zh: 识别疲劳累积、恢复不足、作息混乱等模式。
body.en: Detect patterns such as accumulated fatigue, weak recovery, and irregular routines.

body.zh: 把分析结果压缩成用户今天就能执行的计划。
body.en: Turn the analysis into a plan the user can act on today.

body.zh: 连续多天睡眠缩短，恢复信号不足。
body.en: Sleep has shortened across several days while recovery signals remain weak.

body.zh: 夜间心率偏高，说明身心放松不足。
body.en: Nighttime heart rate is elevated, suggesting incomplete relaxation.

body.zh: 入睡时间持续后移，影响恢复质量。
body.en: Bedtime keeps shifting later, which can degrade recovery quality.

items.zh: 今晚提前 30 分钟入睡
items.en: Go to bed 30 minutes earlier tonight

items.zh: 晚间减少蓝光并降低工作刺激
items.en: Reduce blue light and mental stimulation in the evening

items.zh: 明天安排一次轻度有氧恢复

follow_up.zh: 48 小时内再次评估睡眠和夜间心率变化。
follow_up.en: Re-check sleep and nighttime heart rate changes within 48 hours.

headline.zh: 四类用户都能立即理解 AIHeal 的价值
headline.en: Four clear scenarios where AIHeal proves its value

description.zh: 场景表达不讲抽象技术，而是直接回应用户最关心的问题。
description.en: These scenarios avoid abstract technology claims and speak directly to what users want solved.

problem.zh: 长期疲惫、睡眠差，但不知道原因来自压力、作息还是恢复不足。
problem.en: They feel tired and sleep poorly, but do not know whether stress, routine, or recovery is the problem.

outcome.zh: AI 自动分析最近变化，帮助用户尽快找出高影响因素。
outcome.en: AI analyzes recent changes and helps surface the highest-impact factor quickly.

problem.zh: 父母状态在慢慢变化，家人往往要等到明显不适才发现。
problem.en: Family members often notice changes in parents only after discomfort becomes obvious.

outcome.zh: AIHeal 会标记异常变化并提醒该关注什么。
outcome.en: AIHeal flags unusual changes and tells families what deserves attention.

problem.zh: 训练量上去了，但恢复跟不上，效果开始波动。
problem.en: Training load increases while recovery lags, making results inconsistent.

outcome.zh: 结合活动、睡眠和恢复信号优化训练节奏。
outcome.en: Use activity, sleep, and recovery signals together to tune training rhythm.

problem.zh: 日常数据很多，但很难知道什么时候正在变差。
problem.en: There is plenty of daily data, but it is hard to tell when things are trending worse.

outcome.zh: 通过趋势追踪和风险提示，让用户更早看见变化。
outcome.en: Trend tracking and risk alerts help users spot changes earlier.

headline.zh: 在用户看到价值之后，再解释底层技术
headline.en: Explain the technology only after users see the value

description.zh: AIHeal 的技术不是炫技，而是为了让健康分析更可信、更可控。
description.en: AIHeal's technology is not there for show. It exists to make health analysis more trustworthy and more controllable.

body.zh: 用户始终知道数据来自哪里、如何被使用，以及如何导出或删除。
body.en: Users always know where data comes from, how it is used, and how to export or delete it.

body.zh: 以最小必要原则处理健康数据，把个人控制权放在第一位。
body.en: Health data is handled with a minimum-necessary principle, keeping personal control first.

body.zh: 模型负责解释多源信号、检测模式并输出清晰建议，而不是只给术语。
body.en: The model interprets multi-source signals, detects patterns, and produces clear recommendations instead of jargon.

body.zh: 在合适的场景下，架构支持更灵活的个人健康数据管理方式。
body.en: Where it fits, the architecture supports more flexible ways to manage personal health data.

note.zh: 先让用户相信你能帮助他，再谈技术愿景。
note.en: First prove that you can help the user, then talk about the broader technical vision.

headline.zh: 下载 App，开始你的第一次健康分析
headline.en: Download the app and start your first health analysis

description.zh: 下载页的目标只有一个：降低阻力，让用户尽快拿到第一个结果。
description.en: The download page has one job: reduce friction and get the user to a first result quickly.

body.zh: 连接 Apple Health 后即可自动同步核心健康数据。
body.en: Connect Apple Health and sync core health signals automatically.

body.zh: 接入穿戴设备与手动记录，快速开始趋势分析。
body.en: Bring in wearable data and manual logs to start trend analysis quickly.

onboarding.zh: 无需登录也能先看 Demo
onboarding.en: View the demo before creating an account

onboarding.zh: 不填复杂信息即可开始
onboarding.en: Start without filling a long intake form

onboarding.zh: 首次使用就给出健康评分
onboarding.en: Deliver a health score on the first session

onboarding.zh: 让用户几乎不需要等待
onboarding.en: Keep waiting time close to zero

headline.zh: 给开发者的 API、Agent 与 SDK 入口
headline.en: API, agent, and SDK entry points for developers

description.zh: AIHeal 也可以作为健康分析能力层，被接入到你自己的产品或工作流中。
description.en: AIHeal can also act as a health analysis capability layer inside your own product or workflow.

body.zh: 上传或同步健康信号，返回结构化健康评分、发现、风险和行动建议。
body.en: Send health signals and receive structured scores, findings, risks, and action recommendations.

body.zh: 把健康分析接入对话式 Agent，让建议可以持续追踪与解释。
body.en: Plug the analysis into conversational agents so insights can be followed up and explained over time.

body.zh: 在移动端或 Web 端快速嵌入健康快照、趋势卡片和报告模块。
body.en: Embed health snapshots, trend cards, and report modules quickly on mobile or web surfaces.

body.zh: 原有的 Selection Radar 分析看板仍然保留，可单独启动。
body.en: The original Selection Radar analytics dashboard is still preserved and can be launched separately.

experience_principles.en: See the demo without signing in
Do not force a form first

findings.en: Heart rate variability is outside its usual range

risk.zh: 近期可能存在疲劳累积风险
risk.en: There may be a near-term risk of accumulated fatigue

analysis.zh: 你的睡眠时长减少，同时夜间心率偏高，可能与压力或作息不规律有关。
analysis.en: Your sleep duration is shorter while nighttime heart rate is elevated, which may be linked to stress or an irregular routine.

actions.en: Reduce blue light exposure at night
Add light movement during the day

core_principles.zh: 用户最关心的是：你能帮我什么
core_principles.en: The core user question is simple: how do you help me

core_principles.zh: 不要一上来讲去中心化或数据主权
core_principles.en: Do not lead with decentralization or data ownership

core_principles.zh: 页面顺序必须是：功能 -> 结果 -> 信任 -> 愿景
core_principles.en: The page order should be: features -> outcome -> trust -> vision
